name: Firecrawl Scrape
description: Scrape JS-heavy websites or PDFs using Firecrawl API. Extracts clean markdown, HTML, or other formats.

url.description: The URL to scrape (webpage or PDF).

formats.description: List of formats to extract. Options: 'markdown', 'html', 'rawHtml', 'links', 'screenshot', 'extract'. Defaults to ['markdown'].

waitFor.description: Wait time in milliseconds before scraping. Useful for JS-heavy sites.

onlyMainContent.description: If true, only extracts the main content of the page.
